hero.text: Track on-chain valuation, cycle signals, and model context in one focused workspace.

onboarding.title: Set your analysis profile
onboarding.description: Choose a trading horizon, preferred language, and alert sensitivity after registration.

onboardingCarousel.slide1.headline: Welcome to CryptoMarketAnalysis
onboardingCarousel.slide1.subheading: Professional Bitcoin analysis tools, free forever
onboardingCarousel.slide1.body: Follow cycle signals, valuation models, and on-chain context from a focused workspace built for long-term market decisions.
onboardingCarousel.slide2.headline: Personalize your dashboard
onboardingCarousel.slide2.subheading: Keep the indicators you care about closest
onboardingCarousel.slide2.body: Start with curated KPI widgets, then shape your workspace around valuation, momentum, alerts, and research workflows.
onboardingCarousel.slide3.headline: Explore charts and alerts
onboardingCarousel.slide3.subheading: Turn Bitcoin models into daily operating signals
onboardingCarousel.slide3.body: Open historical charts, compare timeframes, and prepare alerts so important threshold changes do not slip past you.

landing.title: BitWLab — Bitcoin Blockchain Analysis
landing.text: A focused research workspace for Bitcoin valuation models, cycle signals, and long-term market context. Create an account to open the live charts.

landing.accessTitle: Charts, annotations, exports, and admin tools require an account.
